_meta.purpose: Hand-curated notes on canonical suppliers for Morgan Ledger. Overrides Splink's statistical judgement when the entries below say so.
_meta.scope: Top volume canonicals by member_count. Add entries when a real adjudication reveals structural knowledge worth keeping.
_meta.editing_rule: Only record what you have verified (Companies House, corporate history, own knowledge). Speculation stays out.

canonical_suppliers.notes: Atkins (part of AECOM 2017; now part of SNC-Lavalin/AtkinsRéalis). Multiple legacy CH numbers from consolidated Atkins entities are expected within one canonical. Do NOT merge with AECOM — they remained distinct trading brands for most of the FTS window.

Mitie Group plc rolls up dozens of acquired subsidiaries (Mitie Cleaning, Mitie Security, Mitie Engineering, Interserve FM post-2020, etc.). High CH-number count is expected. Morgan: flag but don't auto-split unless a distinct Mitie-brand trading entity is clearly separate (e.g. MiHomecare was divested and later rebranded).
Kier Group plc with multiple construction-trading CH numbers. Kier Highways and Kier Living are distinct businesses — verify before rolling those in.

Capita plc has 100+ group companies. Splink correctly rolls up commodity back-office trading entities. Keep Capita Life & Pensions, Capita Health (divested), and Capita Scottish Property separate if they appear as distinct canonicals — they traded under different brands.
Single-entity IT reseller. One CH (02174990). Any proposed merge with a differently-named company should be rejected unless CH number matches.
Consulting engineering firm. Mott MacDonald Bentley is a distinct JV with Bentley Holdings — keep separate.
Local-government software vendor. Rebrand history (Anite Public Sector → Civica) accounts for legacy CH numbers.
WSP Group (Canadian parent, UK trading). Formerly known as WSP Parsons Brinckerhoff. Do not auto-merge with 'Parsons Brinckerhoff' entries unless CH or address confirms.

canonical_suppliers.canonical_name: turner and townsend project management limited
canonical_suppliers.notes: T&T acquired multiple subsidiaries (Turner & Townsend Contract Services, Turner & Townsend Cost Management). Several CH numbers expected. Do not merge with 'Turner Townsend' construction contractor (different company).
ENGIE UK group — has been through structure changes (ENGIE/Keepmoat/Equans split). Flag proposed merges with Equans UK Ltd for review — they are separate post-2021.
Reed Recruitment group. Reed in Partnership (welfare-to-work) is a distinct trading entity — keep separate.
Wates Group family-owned. Wates Living Space, Wates Smartspace, Needspace are sister trading entities — may be separate canonicals and should stay separate unless CH matches.

Public-sector arm of Zurich Insurance. 'Zurich Municipal' is a brand, not an entity. The underlying CH is typically Zurich Insurance plc (00057203). Multiple CH numbers likely reflect insurance group structure.
Arup Group. UK trading entity is Ove Arup & Partners Ltd. Arup International Development is a registered charity — keep separate.
AECOM global infrastructure consulting. Distinct from Atkins even post-2017 mergers — they operated as separate brands. Do NOT merge.
PwC UK. PwC Services Ltd and PricewaterhouseCoopers International are separate entities — keep distinct unless CH matches.
Jacobs Engineering Group. Jacobs Technology, Jacobs Clean Energy — separate trading entities, verify before merging.
IT reseller. Single CH (02579852). Do not merge with 'Insight Investment' (financial services) or 'Insight Enterprises' (US parent).
